scripts.dev: pnpm build:packages && concurrently -n shared,config,api,worker,web -c blue,green,cyan,yellow,white "pnpm --filter @projectdoc/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @projectdoc/config dev" "pnpm --filter @projectdoc/api dev" "pnpm --filter @projectdoc/worker dev" "pnpm --filter @projectdoc/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter @projectdoc/api build && pnpm --filter @projectdoc/worker build && pnpm --filter @projectdoc/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @projectdoc/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @projectdoc/config typecheck && pnpm --filter @projectdoc/testing typecheck && pnpm --filter @projectdoc/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @projectdoc/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter @projectdoc/web typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
